tasks.subject: Task 1: addInternalLinksForTitle (pure JSON linker)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Schema-free additive linker adding `tomboyInternalLink` to whole-word matches of ONE title in JSONContent, reusing findTitleMatches; idempotent; suppress + title-line skip.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/autoLink/linkifyDocJson.ts", "app/tests/unit/editor/linkifyDocJson.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/linkifyDocJson.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["adds mark on whole-word match, target===title", "no-op on sub-word/absence", "idempotent on already-marked span", "skips title line only when doc has body", "skips suppressed marks", "recurses into list items"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: linkSweep count/apply over corpus
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Headless countLinkSweep/applyLinkSweep: XML-substring prefilter → addInternalLinksForTitle per candidate → (apply) putNote + noteMutated; progress + cancel.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/core/linkSweep.ts", "app/tests/unit/core/linkSweep.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/core/linkSweep.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["count returns would-change guids, excludes target/deleted/non-substring", "already-linked not counted", "apply writes only matched + returns {updated,failed}", "per-note throw -> failed, no abort", "cancel stops + returns subset"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: newNoteFlow result phase + sweep orchestration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add persistent `result` phase (no auto-close) + sweep sub-state with startSweepCount/applySweep/cancelSweep/dismiss wired to linkSweep + flushAll/reloadWindows/emitNoteReload.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/stores/newNoteFlow.svelte.ts", "app/tests/unit/stores/newNoteFlow.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/stores/newNoteFlow.test.ts && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["submit -> phase result, stages keep ms", "dismiss clears + idle", "startSweepCount -> confirm with matched/total", "applySweep -> done + reloadWindows(updated)", "cancelSweep ends without confirm", "stage failure -> toast + idle"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: NewNoteResultPanel + layout wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Render persistent result/sweep UI for phase==='result' (stages+ms, sweep button, count/confirm/apply/done, close), wired in +layout.svelte.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/components/NewNoteResultPanel.svelte", "app/src/routes/+layout.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["result phase shows stages + ms", "sweep button drives count/confirm/apply/done states with Korean labels", "적용/취소/닫기 wired", "npm run check clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Guide card (설정 → 가이드 notes)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document result panel + 전체 문서 반영 in 설정 → 가이드 notes sub-tab (CLAUDE.md guide rule).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/routes/settings/+page.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["guide-card added under notes sub-tab with summary/info-text/guide-list", "npm run check clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: titleProvider delta + shouldRescanForDelta
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Broadcast {added,removed} from doSharedRefresh; pure shouldRescanForDelta predicate; onChange signature (delta?)=>void (backward-compatible).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/autoLink/shouldRescanForDelta.ts", "app/src/lib/editor/autoLink/titleProvider.ts", "app/tests/unit/editor/shouldRescanForDelta.test.ts", "app/tests/unit/editor/titleProvider.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/shouldRescanForDelta.test.ts tests/unit/editor/titleProvider.test.ts && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["predicate: removed->true, added-in-text->true, added-absent->false, empty->false", "doSharedRefresh computes+broadcasts {added,removed}, no broadcast when unchanged", "existing onChange consumers compile/fire"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Delta-gate TomboyEditor automatic rescan
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Gate the automatic full rescan on shouldRescanForDelta(delta, editor.state.doc.textContent) — kills the new-note stutter.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["onChange gated by shouldRescanForDelta(delta, doc.textContent), fallback true when no editor", "npm run check clean + editor tests pass"]}
```
